---
title: "Rāg Darabāri kānaḍā"
subtitle: "*Acala birāja ho*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Tānasen &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Cautāl (Vilambit)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> acala birāja ho siṃhāsana baiṭhe  
> rājādhirāja rājārāma pṛthvī para

**Antarā**

> takhata bakhata tumhi dino karatāra  
> nistāra karana ko, ānanda bhayo taha pura ghara ghara

**Sanchārī**

> aneka aneka bhātanako naga naga takhata śobhā deta  
> māno indu jyota jhala mala kara

**Ābhog**

> tānasena tua guṇa kaha na sakata  
> astuta karata saba loga aura tuhi jahāna para-eka nara

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Cautāl is a 12-beat cycle divided as **2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **O**, **2**, **O**, **3**, **4**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12, with sam **X** at beat 1, **O** (khālī) at beat 3, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 7, **3** at beat 9, and **4** at beat 11. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::


## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | $\lb{RS}$ | R | S | $\lb{\sps{R}\mn{n}}$ | - | $\lb{SRRS}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **a** | **ca** | **la** | **-** | **-** | **bi** |
| $\lb{\mn{n}\mn{d}}$ | $\lb{\mn{n}\mn{d}}$ | $\mn{n}$ | $\mn{P}$ | - | S | S | R | R | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | - | $\lb{RS}$ |
| **rā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| R | - | - | $\lb{gS}$ | - | $\lb{-S}$ | $\mn{n}$ | - | $\lb{SR}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mn{n}}\mn{d}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mn{n}}\mn{d}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mn{n}}\mn{d}}$ |
| **ho** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **siṃ** | **hā** | **-** | **-** | **sa** | **-** | **-** |
| $\mn{n}$ | $\mn{P}$ | - | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | - | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | - | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | - | R | $\lb{SR}$ | -P |
| **na** | **-** | **-** | **bai** | **-** | **ṭhe** | **-** | **rā** | **-** | **jā** | **-** | **dhi** |
| $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | R | - | S | S | R | S | $\lb{\sps{S}R\mn{n}}$ | S | S |
| **rā** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **-** | **-** | **rā** | **jā** | **-** | **rā** | **-** | **ma** |
| R | R | S | $\lb{\sps{S}\mn{n}}$ | S | S | $\lb{\sps{S}m}$ | R | - | - | - | - |
| **pṛ** | **thvī** | **-** | **pa** | **-** | **ra** | **a** | **ca** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{mP}$ | - | - | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | $\lb{n\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ta** | **kha** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **ba kha** | **ta** | **-** | **-** | **tu** | **-** | **mhi** |
| $\tr{S}$ | - | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{n\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{nd}$ | - | $\lb{nd}$ | $\lb{nd}$ | n | P |
| **di** | **-** | **-** | **no** | **-** | **ka** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **tā** | **-** | **ra** |
| $\lb{mP}$ | - | - | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | $\lb{n\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ta** | **kha** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **ba kha** | **ta** | **-** | **-** | **tu** | **-** | **mhi** |
| $\tr{S}$ | - | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{n\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{nd}$ | - | $\lb{nd}$ | $\lb{nd}$ | n | P |
| **di** | **-** | **-** | **no** | **-** | **ka** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **tā** | **-** | **ra** |
| m | P | P | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | P | $\lb{mn}$ | $\lb{\sps{d}n}$ | $\lb{Pd}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}P}$ | $\lb{-m}$ | g |
| **ni** | **-** | **-** | **stā** | **-** | **ra** | **ka** | **ra** | **na** | **ko** | **-** | **-** |
| - | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{mR}$ | $\lb{mP}$ | - | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | P |
| **-** | **ā** | **-** | **nanda** | **-** | **bha** | **yo** | **ta** | **ha** | **pu** | **-** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\sps{m}P}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{\sps{S}mS}$ | R | S | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **gha** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **gha** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | $\lb{SS}$ | S | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | $\lb{Pm}$ | P | - |
| **-** | **ane** | **k** | **a** | **ane** | **ka** | **bhā** | **-** | **-** | **tana** | **ko** |   |
| $\lb{mP}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | $\lb{\sps{\tr{R}}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | n | P | - | m |
| **naga** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **ga** | **-** | **ta** | **kha** | **ta** | **-** | **-** |
| m | P | - | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | P | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | R | - | S |
| **śo** | **-** | **-** | **bhā** | **-** | **de** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **mā** | **-** | **no** |
| $\lb{S-}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | - | P | $\lb{\sps{m}P}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{gm}$ | R | R | S |
| **i** | **ndu** | **-** | **jyo** | **-** | **ta** | **jha** | **la** | **ma** | **la** | **ka** | **ra** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | P | P | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **tā** | **-** | **na** | **se** | **-** | **na** | **tu** | **a** | **-** | **gu** | **-** | **ṇa** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | - | $\lb{\tr{g}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}\tr{R}}$ | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | P |
| **ka** | **ha** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **sa** | **-** | **-** | **ka** | **-** | **ta** |
| m | P | P | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **tā** | **-** | **na** | **se** | **-** | **na** | **tu** | **a** | **-** | **gu** | **-** | **ṇa** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | - | $\lb{\tr{g}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}\tr{R}}$ | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | n | P |
| **ka** | **ha** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **sa** | **-** | **-** | **ka** | **-** | **ta** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}\tr{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{S}}$ | n | d | $\lb{\sps{P}n}$ | P | m | P | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ |
| **a** | **stu** | **-** | **ta ka** | **ra ta** | **-** | **-** | **sa** | **ba** | **-** | **lo** | **ga** |
| $\lb{mgm}$ | R | S | S | S | S | S | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | n | P | $\lb{nm}$ |
| **au** | **-** | **ra** | **tu** | **hi** | **ja** | **hā** | **-** | **na** | **pa** | **ra** | **-** |
| P | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | R | - | S | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **e** | **ka** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
